column1: ?? Basic Data Understanding Questions
1. How many transactions are there in total?
2. How many unique users made transactions?
3. What are the unique transaction types (TxnType) present in the dataset?
4. Which payment apps (AppID) are used, and which is the most popular one?
5. How many transactions are marked as “Success,” “Failed,” or “Pending”?
6. What is the average transaction amount across all transactions?
7. How many distinct states (StateCode) are represented in the dataset?
?? Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Questions
8. Which state has the highest total transaction amount?
9. Which AppID contributes the most to the total transaction volume?
10. What is the average settlement delay (in hours) for successful transactions?
11. Which BankID has the most failed transactions?
12. Is there a correlation between FrozenFunds and PendingTxns?
13. Are there any patterns between device type (DeviceOS) and transaction success rate?
14. Find the top 5 users (UserID) with the highest total transaction value.
15. Identify peak transaction dates — when were the most transactions made?
?? Data Cleaning & Quality Questions
16. How will you handle missing values in SettlementDelayHours and FailReason?
17. Are there any duplicate TxnID values in the dataset?
18. How would you convert the TxnDate column into a proper date format and extract the day/month?
19. Check if any Amount values are zero or negative — how would you treat them?
20. How would you validate that PendingTxns and FrozenFunds are consistent with transaction Status?
?? Analytical & Business Insight Questions
21. Which app (AppID) has the highest failure rate?
22. What is the total value of failed transactions per bank?
23. Which states show the highest number of failed transactions?
24. What percentage of total transactions are made through the Web channel vs App?
25. Which device OS (Android/iOS) has a higher average transaction amount?
26. What is the average number of pending transactions for users with failed payments?
27. Does settlement delay differ across transaction types (P2P, P2M, Bill)?
?? Advanced / ML-Oriented Questions
28. How would you build a model to predict transaction success or failure?
29. Which features (columns) would be most important in predicting transaction outcomes?
30. How would you detect potential fraudulent transactions using this dataset?
31. Can you cluster users based on transaction behavior (App usage, average amount, frequency)?
32. How would you visualize transaction trends over time (daily or weekly)?
?? SQL or Data Manipulation Questions
33. Write a SQL query to find the total transaction amount per AppID.
34. Write a SQL query to find the top 3 states by successful transaction amount.
35. Write a SQL query to calculate average settlement delay by BankID.
36. Write a SQL query to count failed transactions grouped by DeviceOS and TxnType.
